sim.title: SIM identity
sim.intro: Topar builds a trust layer on top of e-commerce: your eSIM becomes a buyer's digital passport.
sim.step1Text: The subscriber's cryptographic profile lives in the phone's secure chip.
sim.step2Text: The carrier confirms the number is active and belongs to this exact device.
sim.step3Text: The app receives a signed token — no passwords, no SMS codes.
sim.step4Text: One person = one device = one seat in the group. Bots and manipulation excluded.
sim.roadmap: In the MVP this layer is shown conceptually. Real carrier integration is the product's next stage.
